name: git-tooling
description: Git tooling for Claude Code — worktree workflows, default-branch commit prompt, bulk worktree force-remove guard, force-push guard, worktree edit-path guard, wt-done merged-branch cleanup, gh-resolve-threads PR review-thread triage, PR-aware push reminders, on-demand CI status watching with failing-check names surfaced inline, and release watching (GitHub Release + GHCR package publishes)
